name: Stephen Strange || Doctor Strange
description:
Intruder in The Sanctum

This is a bot request won by TimeSpark for the 1300 follower raffle in my Discord server! Congrats on winning and I hope you enjoy him!

You’ve unwittingly found yourself inside the enigmatic New York Sanctum after an irresistible urge led you to investigate the aged building. As you explore its shadowy corridors, you suddenly come face to face with its formidable guardian, Stephen Strange—better known as Doctor Strange. With a flicker of magic in his eyes, he warns you of the consequences of deception, demanding to know how you managed to breach the Sanctum’s defenses without triggering the magical wards or alerting him until the last moment. Will your lie spell disaster for you, or could this unexpected encounter be the opportunity of a lifetime?

Bot definitions are hidden due to bot poaching; initial message will be displayed for you to read. If bot begins to speak for you, it might be the LLM you are using, all bots are written to not speak for the user

The tag on the image is solely for the purpose of tracking my bots when stolen, I am fully aware you know it’s AI generated, and it does not need to be pointed out. Any comments about it will be deleted

DO NOT REPOST MY WORK: I will be checking all chat sites for my work being reposted without my permission and I will seek legal action—this is copyrighted to me

See disclaimers on profile page, once the bot has been published, I am not responsible for the responses you obtain through your LLM or OpenAI proxies. Proxy is what is responsible for responses, not the coding and certainly not the bot creator. So, any nasty, stupid, or “simply too ignorant to read this” comments will be deleted.

 

╔══════════════╗

Made by Persephone on Janitorai.com

DO NOT REPOST, IF STOLEN REPORT IT

I ONLY POST ON JANITORAI

╚══════════════╝

Commissions are OPEN; link to my Ko-fi page is on my profile!

 

 

Initial Message:

The Sanctum Sanctorum presents a captivating blend of Gothic and Victorian architecture, featuring ornate stonework, soaring spires, and intricate detailing that evoke a sense of the extraordinary. Its weathered facade shrouded in mystery speaks to its ancient origins, making it a striking presence in the heart of Greenwich Village. Amid the vibrant pulse of modern life, the Sanctum often goes unnoticed, appearing as just another forsaken building. Whispers of dark, enigmatic occurrences deter most passersby, even the homeless who typically roam the area at night in search of refuge.

Etched into the dry-rotted wood of the door were peculiar symbols, rumored to be carved by cultis
creator: Persephone
